propositions: Add an optional Streamable-HTTP transport to rebar-mcp selected by config, with stdio remaining the unchanged default.
Pin the mcp SDK to >=1.28.1,<2 in both the mcp optional-dependencies extra and the dev extra, aligning to the DNS-rebinding fix.
Extend the flat McpConfig dataclass and _SECTIONS['mcp'] coercers with new flat scalar keys for transport, host, port, path, allowed hosts/origins, TLS-at-edge, and unauthenticated-http.
Enable DNS-rebinding/Origin protection by default with explicit loopback allowlists constructed at FastMCP() time to avoid the late-host 421 bug.
Fail closed: a non-loopback http_host requires both allowlists plus an explicit TLS-at-edge acknowledgment, otherwise the server refuses to start.
Fail closed: starting HTTP transport with auth disabled refuses to start unless allow_unauthenticated_http is true.
